analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with HTML, CSS, and JS files. The current theme needs to be updated to focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing files show a mix of cosmic and Egyptian themes, but the black hole theme should be emphasized with dark backgrounds, swirling animations, glowing elements, and interactive content about black holes.

improvements.description: Update the HTML structure to include a black hole-themed layout with sections for animated slides, interactive content, and a cosmic navigation menu.
Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions for interactive components.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function, complete the Black Hole Quiz functionality, and add event listeners for all interactive elements related to black holes.
